pr.title: Match grInishie1_801FA9B4 to 100% by copying the same structure for StageData found in grHeal
pr.author: DavidWeaverAudio

summary: PR 2566 changed only src/melee/gr/grinishie1.c to match grInishie1_801FA9B4. The diff added stage data-related objects, including a grInishie1_StageData wrapper around StageData plus an OSReport format string, moved the callback lookup to a casted offset from grI1_803E48C8, and changed the missing-GObj OSReport call to use the new struct field and filename string. The bot report records one new function match for grInishie1_801FA9B4 from 94.03% to 100.00% and a .data improvement from 19.85% to 55.52%. No human review comments were present in the slice.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; adds grI1 data symbols and StageData wrapper, then rewrites grInishie1_801FA9B4 callback and OSReport accesses for the match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: additions of grI1_803E48C8, grI1_803E4944, grInishie1_StageData, grI1_803E4950, grI1_803E49A8
raw_diff: grInishie1_801FA9B4 callback lookup and OSReport call changed

what_changed.text: Added s16 grI1_803E48C8[22] containing stage block-pattern-like values and used it as the base for a casted StageCallbacks lookup at offset 0x2c.
Added char grI1_803E4944[] = "/GrI1.dat" and char grI1_803E49A8[] = "grinishie1.c".

Added typedef grInishie1_StageData with StageData stage_data followed by char report_fmt_get_gobj[0x24], then instantiated grI1_803E4950 with INISHIE1, /GrI1.dat, the grI1_803E48C8 S16Vec3 pointer, count 7, and the report format string.
Changed OSReport in the gobj-missing path from inline string literals to grI1_803E4950.report_fmt_get_gobj and grI1_803E49A8.
Bot report says the PR produced one new match: main/melee/gr/grinishie1 grInishie1_801FA9B4 from 94.03% to 100.00%, with +15 bytes; it also reports .data improvement from 19.85% to 55.52%.

smart_moves.text: Used a typed wrapper struct to model adjacency between StageData and the following report format string instead of leaving the format string as only an inline literal in the matched function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grInishie1_StageData contains StageData and report_fmt_get_gobj

smart_moves.text: The PR title explicitly identifies grHeal as a sibling layout source for the StageData structure, suggesting cross-stage comparison was used to recover data layout.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage matching, sibling stage translation units may provide useful evidence for StageData-adjacent layout, but the recovered layout should still be checked against section ownership and local symbol metadata before becoming a broader convention.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.pr.title: copying the same structure for StageData found in grHeal
raw_diff: grInishie1_StageData wraps StageData plus report_fmt_get_gobj

decomp_lessons.lesson: A function text match may depend on modeling nearby data layout, including strings used by OSReport, but data and string-symbol changes are high-risk and should be treated as evidence-backed layout work rather than routine cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline OSReport strings replaced by grI1_803E4950.report_fmt_get_gobj and grI1_803E49A8

naming_conventions.name: grInishie1_StageData
naming_conventions.convention: Uses a stage-specific semantic wrapper name for a recovered composite data layout.

naming_conventions.name: report_fmt_get_gobj
naming_conventions.convention: Names the report-format string by its use in the Ground_GetStageGObj failure path.

naming_conventions.name: grI1_803E48C8, grI1_803E4944, grI1_803E4950, grI1_803E49A8
naming_conventions.convention: New data symbols keep address-style names rather than speculative semantic global names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Modeled a composite data layout so code could reference a report-format field through grI1_803E4950 rather than an inline string literal.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Touches data/string ownership and may conflict with standards that prefer inline string literals unless section ownership evidence supports named storage.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reordered local declarations and split initialization of gobj after cb setup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_GObj* gobj declared before cb; gobj assigned after cb
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Local ordering is a matching tactic; the slice includes bot match evidence but no detailed objdiff or adjacent-function regression evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Computed the StageCallbacks pointer via a casted byte offset from grI1_803E48C8 instead of directly indexing grI1_803E48F4.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Raw offset/cast expresses data adjacency for matching but is less typed than direct symbol access; should be revisited if the data layout can be represented more cleanly.

follow_up_queries.query: Search for StageCallbacks pointer derivations from adjacent data arrays using byte offsets in gr files.
follow_up_queries.purpose: Determine whether the raw 0x2c cast is a known matching pattern, a metadata issue, or cleanup debt.

follow_up_queries.query: Check current grinishie1.c and symbols for grI1_803E48C8/grI1_803E4950 ownership and whether later PRs renamed or refactored them.

accepted_candidate_records.title: StageData-adjacent layout can affect stage function matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2566, grInishie1_801FA9B4 reached a bot-reported 100.00% match after grinishie1.c added a grInishie1_StageData wrapper containing StageData plus report_fmt_get_gobj, added nearby grI1 data symbols, and rewrote the function to reference that layout.

source_update_candidates.title: Sibling stage StageData layouts may be evidence, not automatic authority
source_update_candidates.text: When a stage function match depends on StageData layout, compare sibling stage files such as grHeal for authored layout clues, but require local section/symbol evidence before converting ordinary strings or callbacks into adjacent data fields.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.pr.title: copied same structure for StageData found in grHeal
raw_diff: string literals moved into grI1 data objects
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR is a concrete example of sibling-layout matching, but the standards already caution about data ownership; curator should decide whether this is a reinforcing example rather than a new standard.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate whether grI1_803E48C8-to-StageCallbacks offset should be represented with a cleaner typed layout
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2566 uses StageCallbacks* cb = (StageCallbacks*) ((char*) grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c) + arg0. Curator or maintainer may want to check current source, symbols, and sibling stage layouts to see whether a composite typed data structure should own both the S16Vec3 array and callback table.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: casted callback lookup from grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c
source_update_candidates.reason: The offset cast appears to be a narrow matching tactic; it may be reviewable only with stronger layout or objdiff evidence.

rejection_notes.text: Do not generalize from this slice that stage OSReport strings should be converted to named globals or struct fields; the loaded standards caution against string-literal symbol regressions without ownership evidence.
Do not mark grHeal layout copying as an accepted global rule from this PR alone; grHeal source was not included in the loaded evidence.
Do not claim full build, objdiff details, or adjacent regression checks beyond the bot report; those artifacts are not present in the slice.
